meta.name: The Grand Western Loop
meta.tagline: Chicago → West → Chicago · 2 brothers, 1 pickup truck

todos.title: Hotel: West Yellowstone ×2
todos.note: Nights of Jul 9 & 10. July occupancy runs 90%+ and rates $305–559. Backup if full: Island Park, ID (30 min south, cheaper).

todos.title: Hotel: Springdale (Zion) ×2
todos.note: Nights of Jul 14 & 15. Springdale sits at the park gate and fills fast; backup: Hurricane, UT (25 min).

todos.title: Hotel: Jackson or Victor, ID
todos.note: Night of Jul 11. Jackson is charming but ~$300+; Victor, ID over the Teton Pass is ~$180 and 35 min away.

todos.title: Pack for 3 climates
todos.note: Fleece/jacket (Yellowstone nights hit 5–8°C), swimwear + water shoes (the Narrows), sunscreen & 4L water jugs (desert days 38–40°C). Cooler for the truck bed.

todos.title: America the Beautiful pass
todos.note: $80 per vehicle at the Badlands gate — covers every national park on this route (would be $205+ separately). Keep it on the dashboard.

todos.title: Cody Nite Rodeo tickets
todos.note: ~$25/person, runs every summer night at 8pm — for the Jul 8 show. Easy to buy online a couple of days out.

todos.title: Download offline maps (WY, UT, AZ, NM)
todos.note: Google Maps → profile → Offline maps. Dead zones ahead in Yellowstone, Bryce and long stretches of AZ/NM.

todos.title: Universal Hollywood tickets ×2
todos.note: Dated tickets for Sat Jul 18 — from ~$154/adult for July weekends. Buy the Super Nintendo World early-access add-on if available.

todos.title: Silver Dollar City tickets
todos.note: ~$99/person online, for Jul 26. Marvel Cave tour is included with admission — do it in the afternoon heat.

todos.title: Gateway Arch tram slot
todos.note: Book the 3–4pm tram slot online for Jul 27 — summer slots sell out day-of.

days.title: Chicago → Sioux Falls, SD
days.drive: 570 mi · ~8 h — the one big push
days.desc: Knock out the prairie on day one while you're fresh. Evening leg-stretch at Falls Park's waterfalls downtown.

stay.place: Sioux Falls — any downtown chain hotel

days.title: Sioux Falls → Badlands NP → Wall
days.desc: Buy the $80 parks pass at the Badlands gate. Drive the Loop Road in golden-hour light; bighorn sheep at dusk.

stops.name: Badlands NP — Ben Reifel Visitor Center
stops.note: Buy the $80 America the Beautiful pass at the gate

days.title: Black Hills Day — Rushmore & Custer
days.drive: Scenic loop ~100 mi — driving IS the activity
days.desc: Mount Rushmore early (parking $10), then Custer State Park's Wildlife Loop — 1,300 bison roam free — and the Needles Highway's granite tunnels.

stops.name: Custer SP Wildlife Loop (State Game Lodge)
stops.note: 1,300 bison roam free — stay in the truck

stops.name: Crazy Horse Memorial (optional)
stops.note: Visible from the highway viewpoint if skipping

days.title: Rapid City → Devils Tower → Cody, WY
days.desc: Walk the 2 km paved loop under Devils Tower (watch for climbers), then cross the Bighorn Mountains. Tonight: Cody Nite Rodeo, 8pm — bulls, broncos, pure Wyoming.

days.title: Cody → Yellowstone East Side
days.drive: ~130 mi but a full sightseeing day
days.desc: Enter via the East Entrance — “the most scenic 50 miles in America.” Bison jams, elk, maybe wolves at dusk in Hayden Valley.

days.title: Yellowstone Geyser Day
days.desc: Enter the park by 7:30am to beat crowds. Old Faithful erupts ~every 90 min — check predicted times at the visitor center.

stops.name: Fairy Falls TH — Grand Prismatic Overlook
stops.note: THE photo — 1.6 km walk to the overlook

days.title: Yellowstone → Grand Teton → Jackson
days.desc: Catch anything missed in the morning, then drive south — the Teton range appears like a wall.

days.title: Jenny Lake → Salt Lake City
days.desc: Morning: boat shuttle across Jenny Lake (~$12) + the short hike to Hidden Falls & Inspiration Point. Leave ~1pm for Salt Lake City.

stops.name: Jenny Lake Visitor Center
stops.note: Boat shuttle ~$12 → Hidden Falls & Inspiration Point

stay.place: Salt Lake City — cheap recovery night

legs.name: Leg 3 · Red Rock, Vegas & Los Angeles

days.title: SLC → Bryce Canyon Country
days.desc: Slow morning: Temple Square walk, laundry, restock the cooler. Afternoon drive south into red-rock country.

days.title: Bryce Sunrise → Zion Gateway
days.desc: Sunrise Point at dawn (hoodoos glow orange), then the Queen's Garden → Navajo Loop combo — 4.6 km, the best short hike in Utah. Afternoon: Hwy 89 → the Zion–Mt Carmel tunnel into Springdale.

stops.name: Bryce — Sunrise Point (dawn!)
stops.note: Hoodoos glow orange at first light

stops.name: Queen's Garden / Navajo Loop (Sunset Point)
stops.note: 4.6 km combo hike — do it before the heat

days.title: Zion — Hike the Narrows
days.desc: First shuttles ~6am — be on one. Rent water shoes + pole in Springdale (~$30). Hiking in the river is how you beat the heat. Pool + ice cream after 1pm.

stops.name: Zion Visitor Center (park shuttle)
stops.note: Park in Springdale, free town shuttle to the gate

stops.name: Temple of Sinawava — Riverside Walk
stops.note: Then wade upstream into the Narrows

days.title: Zion → Las Vegas
days.desc: Arrive early afternoon, nap in the A/C. Evening: the Strip as a free spectacle + one legendary buffet. Midweek rooms are a bargain.

days.title: Vegas → Los Angeles
days.desc: Beat the heat and the Friday traffic. Evening: Griffith Observatory at sunset — the whole LA basin in one view. First In-N-Out (order it “animal style”).

days.title: Universal Studios Hollywood
days.drive: Zero driving — park at the resort
days.desc: Arrive at opening (9am). Priority order: Super Nintendo World & Mario Kart first, then the Lower Lot (Jurassic World, Transformers), Studio Tour midday, Hogwarts & Butterbeer in the afternoon.

stops.name: Universal Studios Hollywood
stops.note: Nintendo World first, Studio Tour midday

days.title: LA Beach Day — the Pacific
days.desc: Santa Monica Pier — the official western end of Route 66 (you'll drive the eastern stretches home). Dip in the Pacific, tacos, sunset from the Ferris wheel ($10).

days.title: LA → Route 66 → Williams, AZ
days.desc: Leave by 8am. Detour onto historic Route 66 at Kingman → Seligman, the town that inspired Cars. Williams is the last Route 66 town bypassed by the interstate — neon signs, diners.

stops.name: Delgadillo's Snow Cap, Seligman
stops.note: Milkshake in the town that inspired Cars

days.title: Grand Canyon South Rim
days.wx: Rim ~29°C (2,100 m) — do NOT hike deep
days.desc: Sunrise at Mather Point, walk the flat Rim Trail, free shuttle to the Hermit's Rest viewpoints. If you must descend: Bright Angel to the 1.5-mile resthouse, before 8am only. Sunset at Hopi Point is the grand finale.

days.title: Desert View → Petrified Forest → Santa Fe
days.desc: Exit the canyon east past the Desert View Watchtower. Adobe evening in Santa Fe — the oldest capital in the US.

stops.name: Standin' on the Corner, Winslow AZ
Petrified Forest NP
stops.note: Quick drive-through — covered by your pass

stay.place: Santa Fe — oldest capital in the US

days.title: Santa Fe → Amarillo, TX
days.desc: Morning on Santa Fe Plaza: 400-year-old adobe old town and green-chile everything for lunch. Sunset: spray-paint a Cadillac at Cadillac Ranch (grab cans at a hardware store). Dinner at the Big Texan — watch someone attempt the 72oz steak challenge.

stops.name: Santa Fe Plaza
stops.note: Palace of the Governors, green-chile lunch

days.title: Amarillo → Oklahoma City
days.desc: Old Route 66 alignments if you like, then a relaxed OKC afternoon and Oklahoma's famous onion burgers.

days.title: OKC → Branson, MO (Ozarks)
days.desc: Into the green Ozark hills — suddenly the West is behind you. Evening at Branson Landing on the lakefront; early night before the theme park.

days.title: Silver Dollar City — Theme Park #2
days.desc: An 1880s frontier town in the forest with world-class coasters: Time Traveler and Outlaw Run. Marvel Cave tour is included — do it during the afternoon heat. Cinnamon bread is mandatory.

stops.name: Silver Dollar City
stops.note: Time Traveler, Outlaw Run, Marvel Cave in the heat

days.title: Branson → St. Louis
days.desc: Ride the space-age tram to the top of the Gateway Arch (192 m — book the 3–4pm slot online). Frozen custard “concrete” at Ted Drewes, a Route 66 landmark since 1929.

stops.name: Gateway Arch
stops.note: Tram to the top — book 3–4pm slot

days.title: St. Louis → Chicago (O'Hare)
days.desc: Old Route 66 towns on the way if you want one last dose. Farewell deep-dish dinner. Fill the tank tonight so the truck goes back full.

days.title: Return Truck → Flight 16:40
days.desc: Return the pickup by late morning (allow time for the rental inspection), airport by 13:30 for the 16:40 departure. Güle güle, America. 🇺🇸→🇹🇷

stay.place: 24 nights · ~4,900 miles · one loop of a lifetime

rows: Avg ≈ $185/night (splurges: W. Yellowstone, Springdale, Jackson · offsets: Vegas, TX/OK, Branson)
America the Beautiful — one per vehicle, covers all 7 parks
Rodeo ($50), Jenny Lake boat ($24), Arch tram ($40), Rushmore parking ($10), Narrows gear ($60)

tips.d: Desert days hit 38–41°C. Hike 6–10am only, 4L water per person in the truck, never leave anyone (or food) in a parked car.
Yellowstone: 25 m from bison/elk, 100 m from bears. Bison look slow; they sprint at 55 km/h. Photograph from the truck.
Fill up at half-tank in WY/UT/AZ — stations can be 100+ km apart. GasBuddy app finds the cheapest pumps.
Private cars are banned on the Scenic Drive in summer. Park in Springdale, ride the free town shuttle to the gate, then the park shuttle.
Expect dead zones in Yellowstone, Bryce and stretches of AZ/NM. Download offline Google Maps for WY, UT, AZ, NM before Jul 8.
You'll cross Central → Mountain (Jul 6) → Pacific (Jul 16) → back. Double-check park shuttle and rodeo times against your phone's auto-update.
